---
title: "snapr is now on CRAN!"
description: "Announcing the CRAN release of snapr, an R package providing convenient snapshot testing functions for R package developers."
author: "Douglas Ezra Morrison"
date: "2026-06-05"
categories: [R, packages, testing, CRAN]
---

I'm excited to announce that [snapr](https://cran.r-project.org/package=snapr) is now available on CRAN!

## What is snapr?

`snapr` provides convenient snapshot testing functions for R packages. Snapshot tests (also called "golden tests") work by saving the output of a function call to a file on the first run, then comparing subsequent runs against that saved snapshot. This makes it easy to detect unintended changes in function output.

## Installation

You can install snapr from CRAN:

```r
install.packages("snapr")
```

Or install the development version from GitHub:

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("d-morrison/snapr")
```

## Resources

- [CRAN page](https://cran.r-project.org/package=snapr)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/d-morrison/snapr)
- [Package documentation](https://d-morrison.github.io/snapr/)
